title: selaginella burbidgei
intro: Selaginella burbidgei, also known as the Burbidge's spike moss, is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, which is a type of rhizomatous, mat-forming or scrambling fern-like plant. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella burbidgei are thought to include the reduction of inflammation and the improvement of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
